section_name: Vehicle Registration Receipt for Certain Heavy Vehicles
chapter_title: Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
text:
(a) A copy of the registration receipt issued under Section 502.057 (Registration Receipt) for a commercial motor vehicle, truck-tractor, trailer, or semitrailer shall be:

(1) carried on the vehicle when the vehicle is on a public highway; and

(2) presented to an officer authorized to enforce this chapter on request of the officer.

(b) A copy of the registration receipt is:

(1) admissible in evidence in any cause in which the gross registered weight of the vehicle is an issue; and

(2) prima facie evidence of the gross weight for which the vehicle is registered.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 621. Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
##### § 621.002 — Vehicle Registration Receipt for Certain Heavy Vehicles

(a) A copy of the registration receipt issued under Section 502.057 (Registration Receipt) for a commercial motor vehicle, truck-tractor, trailer, or semitrailer shall be:

    (1) carried on the vehicle when the vehicle is on a public highway; and

    (2) presented to an officer authorized to enforce this chapter on request of the officer.

(b) A copy of the registration receipt is:

    (1) admissible in evidence in any cause in which the gross registered weight of the vehicle is an issue; and

    (2) prima facie evidence of the gross weight for which the vehicle is registered.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135 (H.B.2741), Sec. 98, eff. September 1, 2013.*
